summary: The protagonist, known as Alley Boss, rejects an invitation to join a major guild, leading to a confrontation regarding his standing and reputation. Later, he faces professional setbacks when a sponsor drops his streams in favor of his growing fame, causing tension with other streamers like Tian Hu. Ultimately, Alley Boss continues his journey and manages to successfully track down and discover a hidden rebel camp in the desert.
key_moments: Alley Boss rejects a recruitment offer from a large guild.
Alley Boss loses a sponsorship deal because a company prefers to sign him over another famous streamer.
Alley Boss tracks footprints through the desert to discover the location of a secret rebel camp.
